title: Manipulating Large Language Models to Increase Product Visibility
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into search engines to provide natural language responses tailored to user queries. This work investigates whether LLM recommendations can be manipulated to enhance product visibility. The authors demonstrate that adding a Strategic Text Sequence (STS) — a carefully crafted message — to a product's information page can significantly increase its likelihood of being listed as the LLM's top recommendation. Using a catalog of fictitious coffee machines, the STS is optimized via the Greedy Coordinate Gradient (GCG) algorithm to minimize cross-entropy loss against the target rank position. The sequence can be made robust to variations in product ordering by randomizing the product list during optimization.
key_findings: A Strategic Text Sequence (STS) optimized via GCG algorithm can transform a product from never-recommended to top recommendation in ~100 iterations
Products with high prices ($199) that normally never appear can become the #1 recommendation with STS, bypassing the LLM's price-sensitivity constraint
STS optimization with random product permutations significantly improves robustness — advantage rate jumps from ~40% to much higher when order randomization is used during training
Even products already ranking #2 can be boosted to #1 with high probability using STS
The GCG algorithm (originally for jailbreaking LLMs) can be repurposed for benign commercial objectives like product visibility enhancement
Without robust optimization (fixed product order), the STS advantage can be neutralized by random product ordering in the LLM's prompt
Attack requires white-box access to the LLM (open-source models like Llama-2), but transfer to black-box models like GPT-4 has been shown in prior work
The ability to manipulate LLM search responses gives vendors significant competitive advantage with far-reaching implications for market dynamics

extracted_strategies.name: Strategic Text Sequence (STS) Injection
extracted_strategies.what: 在产品信息页面的描述字段中插入一个由对抗性攻击算法（GCG）优化的短文本序列——这是一段对人看起来无意义但对LLM有强操纵效果的token序列。
extracted_strategies.why: GCG优化的STS通过梯度信号找到了最小化LLM输出cross-entropy（针对'1. [目标产品名]'）的token组合，使得LLM在处理产品列表时自动将该产品排在第一位。从'从未推荐'到'top推荐'仅需~100次迭代。
extracted_strategies.how: 1. 需要访问开源LLM（如Llama-2）进行STS优化；2. 使用GCG算法，目标是最小化输出'1. [产品名]'的cross-entropy loss；3. 在目标产品的描述字段中插入优化后的token序列；4. 为增加鲁棒性，在优化过程中随机排列产品列表顺序。
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 产品从0%推荐率提升至~80%+的top推荐率（论文展示的效果）
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 在目标LLM上运行A/B测试：有/无STS时产品的推荐排名变化

extracted_strategies.name: Robust Product Order-Aware Optimization
extracted_strategies.what: 在优化STS时，每次迭代随机排列产品列表顺序，使STS对输入中的产品排序具有鲁棒性——而非仅在固定顺序下有效。
extracted_strategies.why: 固定顺序优化的STS在随机产品排列下仅提供~40%优势，且有显著概率产生劣势。随机排列优化后的STS优势大幅提升，劣势几乎归零。现实场景中AI搜索输入的产品顺序不可控，鲁棒性是必要条件。
extracted_strategies.how: 1. 在GCG算法的每次迭代中，随机排列产品JSON列表的顺序；2. 基于该排列计算loss并更新STS tokens；3. 继续迭代直到STS在所有排列下都表现稳定。
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: STS优势从~40%提升至显著更高（论文图5b展示），劣势概率趋近于0
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 在200+次随机产品排列的独立评估中，统计有STS vs 无STS的排名优势概率

extracted_strategies.name: Price-Irrelevance Bypass via Persuasive Content
extracted_strategies.what: 对于与用户查询标准不匹配的产品（如用户要'affordable'但你的产品是$199高端款），使用STS使LLM忽略价格约束，将你的产品排在更便宜的竞品之前。
extracted_strategies.why: ColdBrew Master ($199) 在用户搜索'affordable coffee machine'时从未被推荐。加入STS后，LLM将其排为第一推荐，甚至排在$59和$29的竞品前面。STS覆盖了LLM对用户查询约束的匹配逻辑。
extracted_strategies.how: 1. 分析你的产品与主流搜索意图的匹配差距（价格、功能、目标人群等）；2. 专门优化STS以覆盖这些匹配差距；3. 测试STS是否使LLM在'不匹配'的查询中也推荐你的产品。
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 产品在不匹配查询中的推荐率从0%提升至top-1（论文中ColdBrew Master从不可见到第一推荐）
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 针对目标查询类别运行Probe，检查价格/特性不匹配产品是否被推荐

extracted_strategies.name: GCG-Based Content Optimization Pipeline
extracted_strategies.what: 建立系统化的GCG内容优化管道：使用开源LLM作为代理模型，针对目标排名位置优化页面内容中的token序列，然后将优化后的内容部署到生产环境。
extracted_strategies.why: GCG算法已被证明可迁移到黑盒模型（GPT-4）。在开源模型上优化的STS可能对商业AI搜索也有效。这种系统化的排序优化管道比手工SEO/AEO更精确。
extracted_strategies.how: 1. 选择开源代理LLM（Llama-2/3, Mistral等）；2. 构建模拟AI搜索prompt（系统提示+产品列表+用户查询）；3. 使用GCG在描述字段中优化STS（目标：最小化'1. [产品名]'的loss）；4. 2000次迭代通常足够收敛；5. 验证迁移性（在多个模型上测试）。
extracted_strategies.expected_impact: 系统性优化比手工AEO更精确、可量化；产品top-1推荐率显著提升
extracted_strategies.how_to_verify: 在代理模型和生产模型上分别进行A/B测试验证迁移效果

key_metrics.robust_improvement: Random-order optimization boosts advantage significantly over fixed-order
key_metrics.models: Llama-2 (primary); transferability to GPT-4 demonstrated in prior GCG work
key_metrics.price_bypass: $199 product ranked above $29-$59 alternatives despite 'affordable' query
